description: Curated Q2 2026 AI security documents with links verified before inclusion. Used by scripts/collect_web.py as ranked topDocs candidates alongside scraped RSS/HTML documents.

documents.title: State of Agentic AI Security and Governance 2.01
documents.why: Large-format GenAI security and governance guide for autonomous AI systems, covering agentic application risks, governance models, frameworks, and safe deployment practices.

documents.title: State of Agent Security — Q2 2026 (Version 2.0)
documents.why: Quarterly snapshot of vulnerabilities and infrastructure risks around AI agents, agent registries, and supply-chain surfaces.

documents.title: Project Glasswing: An initial update
documents.why: Fresh field report on AI-assisted cyber defense, vulnerability discovery at scale, coordinated disclosure, triage, and patching bottlenecks.

documents.title: Strengthening our Frontier Safety Framework (FSF 3.1 update)
documents.why: Q2 update to a frontier model risk framework, including expanded domains and tracked capability levels relevant to agentic systems.

documents.title: AI Inference Servers Are the New Internet Edge (LMDeploy SSRF case study)
documents.why: Q2 2026 analysis of inference-server exposure patterns, including SSRF, unsafe deserialization, default-auth problems, and remediation guidance.

documents.title: Frontier AI Trends Report
documents.why: Public trend report on frontier AI evaluations and safeguards, useful as quarterly context for governance and risk tracking.
